title: Epoxy Floors for Municipal & Government Buildings - Elite South Texas
content:
Municipal and Government
Local governments may require specialty flooring in a variety of interior and exterior spaces, including public areas as well as government buildings, in order to increase durability and aesthetic appeal. Our flooring systems are stain and chemical resistant as well as offering protection from heavy traffic and machinery. These surfaces are easy to clean and maintain and offer variable levels of slip resistance, even when wet.
Advantages
CSI Division 9 – Finishes: Interior – Resinous flooring
Highly abrasion and chemical resistant
Coefficient of friction (COF) levels meet or exceed ADA Flat & Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA recommendations
Slip resistant even when wet
Easy to clean and maintain
Quick installation, minimal downtime
Exceeds durability requirements for heavy traffic and equipment
More cost effective than removal and replacement
Antimicrobial and antibacterial
CSI Division 3 – Concrete: Interior or exterior – Cementitious polymer modified finishes
More cost effective than removal and replacement
Extreme temperature resistance (hot & cold)
Exceeds durability requirements for heavy traffic and equipment
Quick installation, minimal downtime
Mold and mildew resistant
UV stable
Easy to maintain and stain resistant
Resistant to de-icing chemicals and salts
Cove/Cant Base
Virtually unlimited.
Contact an Elite South Texas technical representative for applicability
